summary: Completed full UI flow testing for PhotographerDirectory to ScheduledBookingDrawer 5-step booking flow. All features verified working: PhotographerDirectory (50 photographers, search, filters, View on Map), ScheduledBookingDrawer with ExactTimeSlotPicker (5 session categories, calendar, 15-min time slots, duration), ImpactZonePicker (GPS, presets, manual), Payment step, and Confirmation step with Confirm & Pay button.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint may not exist or path is different

issues: AccountCreditSection not visible when user has 0 credits (expected behavior)

critical_code_review_comments: PhotographerDirectory.js - Shows 50 photographers with search, filters (Region, Gear Type, Skill Level), and View on Map button
ScheduledBookingDrawer.js - 5-step flow (time -> location -> payment -> confirm -> success) with proper step progress indicator
ExactTimeSlotPicker.js - 5 session categories (Dawn Patrol 5-7:30AM, Morning 7:30-11AM, Midday 11AM-3PM, Sunset 3-7PM, Full Day), calendar, 15-min time slots, duration options
ImpactZonePicker - GPS button, 3 preset locations (Home Break, Beach Parking, Nearest Pier), manual input with Set button
AccountCreditSection - Only shows when user has credits > 0 (kelly@surf.com has 0 credits)
data-testid attributes verified: continue-to-location-btn, continue-to-payment-btn, review-booking-btn, confirm-booking-btn
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full PhotographerDirectory -> ScheduledBookingDrawer flow verified. 50 test photographers available. ExactTimeSlotPicker shows 5 session categories with 15-min time slots. ImpactZonePicker has GPS, preset, and manual options. AccountCreditSection only shows when user has credits. Confirm & Pay button present at final step.

exact_time_slot_picker.cross_sell_live_now: PASS - Can't Wait? Live Now button

impact_zone_picker.manual_input: PASS - text input with Set button

console_warnings: Failed to fetch bookings: AxiosError - /api/bookings/surfer/{user_id} returns 404
